message:
fix(persist/server): guard LZF OOM via size cap, fix checked_add overflow, fix single-quote escaping

- fr-persist: reject LZF decompression targets larger than 512 MB to prevent
  OOM via crafted RDB headers; use checked_add when computing string end offset
  to prevent integer overflow on malicious length fields
- fr-server: single-quoted inline arguments now support \' escape sequences,
  matching Redis inline-protocol behaviour

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
